company.what_they_do: Unknown. No publicly indexed content was found at projectdomesday.com. The domain exists (an email was received from it) but no website content, product/service description, about page, or any third-party reference to 'Project Domesday' as an organisation was discoverable via web search.
company.raw_notes: Multiple searches for 'projectdomesday.com', 'Project Domesday' (as a startup or company), and 'joe@projectdomesday.com' returned no relevant results. All search results returned references to unrelated 'Domesday'-named projects: the 1986 BBC Domesday interactive videodisc project, the Domesday86.com hardware-preservation project, the Hull Domesday Project (academic, Domesday Book of 1086), opendomesday.org (Anna Powell-Smith's open Domesday Book), and domesday.digital (an environmental journalling app). None of these are associated with the domain projectdomesday.com. The domain may host a pre-launch, private, or very new site not yet indexed by search engines.
